creator: FreeBSD@ShaneWare.Biz
text:
Created attachment 150303
CoinUpdate.patch

The attached patch applies to 
graphics/Coin
x11-toolkits/soqt
x11-toolkits/SoXt

Coin and soqt have recently been changed to GPLv2 LICENSE in error.

Historically these were released under a dual gpl/commercial license.
From 1st November 2011 the source code for these was moved to bitbucket and re-licensed under the BSD 3-clause license.

See: https://bitbucket.org/Coin3D/coin/wiki/EndOfLifeLetter
